mainEntity.name: Can small Phoenix law firms compete in Perplexity against big firms?
mainEntity.text: Can small Phoenix law firms compete in Perplexity against big firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, small Phoenix firms compete by niching into underserved queries like 'Phoenix probate for blended families' with superior, updated content.

suggestedAnswer.text: Big Phoenix firms dominate broad terms; target long-tail with videos transcripts and lists. Build authority via guest posts on azbar.org. Small firms often outperform in 4-8 months.

name: Small Phoenix Firms vs Big in Perplexity
description: Yes, small Phoenix firms compete by niching into underserved queries like 'Phoenix probate for blended families' with superior, updated content.
